case_title: VEE QUIGLEY VS. JOHNSON & JOHNSON SERVICES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-09-2013 CONTINUED TO MAY-08-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUIGLEY, VEE

NOT REPORTED. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-08-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. CASE IS COORDINATED IN JCCP 4649 PURSUANT TO ORDER GRANTING AMENDED TWELFTH PETITION FOR COORDINATION OF ADD-ON CASES FILED JAN-08-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 303.
